description_long: This object represents a simplified, abstract figure of a wheelchair user, featuring a white, rounded torso with a smiling face and three small buttons down the front. The arms are long, thin, and purple, extending downward from black, rounded shoulder joints. The legs are pale green and slightly bent, with purple, oval shapes at the knees, suggesting padding or joint covers. The wheels of the wheelchair are depicted as two large, flat, purple discs positioned at the sides of the legs, with thin purple lines connecting to the arms, possibly representing wheel axles or spokes. The overall form is minimalistic, with exaggerated limb proportions and a playful, stylized appearance. The figure is designed to be visually distinct and easily recognizable as a wheelchair user in an urban context.
description: A stylized, abstract figure of a wheelchair user with a white torso, purple arms and wheels, and green legs, featuring a smiling face and exaggerated limb proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smiling face, three buttons, both purple arms, green legs, and the purple wheels and knee pads clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, the alignment of the purple wheels, and the extended arm and leg on one side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both arms, and the backs of the legs and wheels, with less facial detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thin profile, the arrangement of the wheels, and the extended arm and leg on the other side.
attribute_wheel_configuration: two large side wheels, no visible front or rear casters
attribute_seating_posture: Upright with arms extended downward and legs slightly bent forward.
